farm.name: Søndre Haugen Farm
farm.motto: Historic settings for life's greatest moments

founder.name: Håvard Pedersen
founder.bioShort: Håvard Pedersen is a Norwegian guitarist, singer, and songwriter — from Vardø to Oslo. At Søndre Haugen Farm he creates historic frames for weddings, celebrations, and motorhome guests; on stage he delivers blues-rock with The Blues Is Alright Band.
highlights: Mezzabarba · The Blues Is Alright Band
Album guests: John Norum · Ronni Le Tekrø
Studio: Peter Michelsen · The Norwegian Sound, Mjøndalen

gretsch.title: Gretsch endorsement
gretsch.body: Håvard is an official Gretsch-endorsed artist — welcomed into the Gretsch family in the spirit of the Gretsch 135th anniversary. Endorsed logos are approved for marketing; the focus is Håvard and the Gretsch Company.
gretsch.publicNote: In public posts and social media, please reference the Gretsch Company only (not individual contacts at Gretsch).
